author: @DoNotPushHere
text:
There is a company that sells some sort of microscope like this with a smaller glass bead. The lens is a sphere and the smaller, the more magnification, but the closer you have to lean on the glass bead. Almost touching it with your very eyeball.
You can distinguish the cells of the thin skin layer of an onion...
